execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

fn classify(_ n: Int) -> String
  if n <= 3
    "short"
  else if n <= 7
    "medium"
  else
    "long"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let total = string.len(input)
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < total
    let b = string.byte_at(input, i).ok_or(0)
    match b
    when Ok(byte)
      if byte == 10
        let line = string.substring(input, start, i)
        let len = string.len(line)
        if len > 0
          let cat = classify(len)
          println("#{line} -> #{cat}")
        end
        start = i + 1
      end
    when Err(_)
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start < total
    let line = string.substring(input, start, total)
    let len = string.len(line)
    if len > 0
      let cat = classify(len)
      println("#{line} -> #{cat}")
    end
  end
end
